member.name: T:CloudPub.ChannelRelays.TcpDataChannelRelay
member.summary: implementation that forwards tunneled bytes to a local TCP socket.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ChannelRelays.TcpDataChannelRelay.CreateAsync(System.UInt32,System.String,System.UInt32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to : and wraps the stream in a relay instance.
member.param: Server-assigned channel id.
Hostname or IP of the local service.
TCP port of the local service.
A token to cancel the connect operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.ChannelRelays.UdpDataChannelRelay
member.summary: implementation that forwards tunneled datagrams to a local UDP socket.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ChannelRelays.UdpDataChannelRelay.CreateAsync(System.UInt32,System.String,System.UInt32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Binds an outbound UDP association to :.
member.param: Server-assigned channel id.
Hostname or IP of the local UDP service.
UDP port of the local service.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubClient
member.summary: Default implementation of that connects over WebSocket, exchanges protocol messages, and manages local data-channel relays.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.#ctor(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions,CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Connection and agent configuration.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes the WebSocket session and starts the receive loop for inbound messages.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.ExchangeAsync(CloudPub.Protocol.Message,CloudPub.Protocol.Message.MessageOneofCase,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a request message and waits asynchronously for the first response whose matches one of the specified cases.
member.param: The outbound message to send.
One or more expected response message kinds.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.Purge
member.summary: Deletes the local on-disk cache directory used by the client under the user's application data folder.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the asynchronously.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClient.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the .

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient
member.summary: Abstraction for a CloudPub agent client that maintains a server connection and performs request/response exchanges over the CloudPub protocol.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes the connection and begins processing inbound protocol messages.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient.ExchangeAsync(CloudPub.Protocol.Message,CloudPub.Protocol.Message.MessageOneofCase,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message and waits for a response matching one of the specified message kinds.
member.param: The message to send.
Allowed response message kinds.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The first received message whose kind is in .

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules
member.summary: Defines per-protocol relay factory mappings used by the CloudPub client.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules.AddCustomProtocolRelay(CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType,System.Func{CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay})
member.summary: Associates a protocol with a relay factory used to create data-channel relays.
member.param: Protocol to bind.
Factory that creates a relay instance for that protocol.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules.GetCustomProtocolRelay(CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Resolves the relay factory for a protocol, if it was registered.
member.param: Protocol to resolve.
member.returns: The registered relay factory, or null if none was configured.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay
member.summary: Abstraction for forwarding bytes between CloudPub data channels and a local TCP or UDP socket.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets the server-assigned channel identifier for this relay.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay.TotalConsumed
member.summary: Gets the total amount consumed, represented as an unsigned integer.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay.WriteAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes data to the underlying local connection.
member.param: Payload received from the tunnel.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IDataChannelRelay.ReadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads data from underlaying local connection.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.IMessageExchanger
member.summary: Decodes inbound protocol traffic and dispatches work to socket sends and local relays.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IMessageExchanger.WaitForMessageAsync(CloudPub.Protocol.Message.MessageOneofCase,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Waits until the pending message queue may have items to read.
member.param: A message of awaiting type.
A token to cancel the wait.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IMessageExchanger.HandleMessage(CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport,CloudPub.Protocol.Message,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes one inbound message from the server.
member.param: Transport for sending replies.
The received message.
A token to cancel outbound operations.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.RelayState.BeginReadAsync(CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins to continously read data from socket

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.IRelaysManager
member.summary: Manages per-channel relays that connect CloudPub data channels to local services.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IRelaysManager.CreateDataChannel(System.UInt32,CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a relay for an incoming data channel targeting a local .
member.param: Server-assigned channel id.
Local bind/connect parameters from the server.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IRelaysManager.WriteDataChannel(System.UInt32,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Forwards tunneled bytes to the relay for .
member.param: Target channel id.
Payload to write locally.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.IRelaysManager.DeleteDataChannel(System.UInt32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tears down and disposes the relay for .
member.param: Channel id to close.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport
member.summary: Abstraction over the CloudPub agent connection (typically a WebSocket) used to send and receive protobuf messages.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport.Options
member.summary: Gets the client options associated with this transport.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes the connection and completes the handshake.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport.StartReceivingAsync(CloudPub.Components.IMessageExchanger,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts receiving messages and dispatching them to .
member.param: Handler for inbound messages.
A token to cancel the receive loop.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Components.ISocketTransport.SendAsync(CloudPub.Protocol.Message,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to the server.
member.param: The message to send.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.LocalAuthFacility
member.summary: Default implementation of . Stores client info in the local storage.

member.name: T:CloudPub.MessageExchanger
member.summary: Routes inbound instances from the socket: handles heartbeats, errors, endpoint acknowledgements, and multiplexed data channels via .
member.param: Client options (reserved for future use).
Registry used to open, write, and close local data-channel relays.

member.name: M:CloudPub.MessageExchanger.#ctor(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions,CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules,CloudPub.Components.IRelaysManager)
member.summary: Routes inbound instances from the socket: handles heartbeats, errors, endpoint acknowledgements, and multiplexed data channels via .
member.param: Client options (reserved for future use).
Registry used to open, write, and close local data-channel relays.

member.name: M:CloudPub.MessageExchanger.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Releases resources associated with the exchanger.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration for connecting to CloudPub: server URL, session credentials, timeouts, and agent identity fields.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.ServerUri
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP(S) base URL of the CloudPub control plane; WebSocket URL is derived from this value.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time to wait for handshake steps after connecting.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Proxy
member.summary: Gets or sets the proxy using to connect to server.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.KeepAliveInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets time interval of web socket heartbeats.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.ResumeEndpointsOnConnect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to send EndpointStartAll after the receive loop starts.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the session token returned by the server after a successful handshake (may be empty before connect).

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the account email used in the agent hello when authenticating.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the account password used in the agent hello when authenticating.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.AgentId
member.summary: Gets or sets a stable agent identifier; a new GUID is used when left empty.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.Hwid
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional hardware identifier string reported to the server.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions.ClientVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the client version string sent in AgentInfo; a default is used when empty.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions
member.summary: Describes a local service to expose through CloudPub: protocol, address or URL, optional auth, and traffic rules.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Protocol
member.summary: Gets or sets the application-level protocol for the published endpoint.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Auth
member.summary: Gets or sets the authentication mode; when null, a default is chosen (e.g. Basic for WebDAV).

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Address
member.summary: Gets or sets the local bind address: port number, host:port, host with path, or a full URL depending on protocol.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets a human-readable name stored as the endpoint description.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Acl
member.summary: Gets or sets optional access control entries for the endpoint.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Headers
member.summary: Gets or sets optional HTTP headers to associate with the published service.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions.Rules
member.summary: Gets or sets optional filter rules applied to traffic for this endpoint.

member.name: T:CloudPub.RelaysManager
member.summary: Thread-safe registry of instances keyed by server-assigned channel id, selecting TCP or UDP relays based on the endpoint protocol.

member.name: M:CloudPub.RelaysManager.#ctor(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubRules)
member.summary: Thread-safe registry of instances keyed by server-assigned channel id, selecting TCP or UDP relays based on the endpoint protocol.

member.name: M:CloudPub.RelaysManager.CreateDataChannel(System.UInt32,CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a local relay for the given channel id according to (TCP by default, UDP when requested).
member.param: Server-assigned data channel identifier.
Describes the local address and protocol to connect to.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.RelaysManager.WriteDataChannel(System.UInt32,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes payload bytes to the relay for , if a relay exists.
member.param: Target data channel identifier.
Bytes to forward to the local socket.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.RelaysManager.DeleteDataChannel(System.UInt32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disposes and removes the relay for , if present.
member.param: Data channel identifier to tear down.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.SocketTransport
member.summary: WebSocket-based transport that performs the agent handshake, sends binary protobuf frames, and runs a receive loop dispatching messages to an .
member.param: Server URI, credentials, timeouts, and agent metadata.

member.name: M:CloudPub.SocketTransport.#ctor(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions,CloudPub.Components.IAuthFacility)
member.summary: WebSocket-based transport that performs the agent handshake, sends binary protobuf frames, and runs a receive loop dispatching messages to an .
member.param: Server URI, credentials, timeouts, and agent metadata.

member.name: P:CloudPub.SocketTransport.Options
member.summary: Gets the options this transport was constructed with (token may be updated after handshake).

member.name: M:CloudPub.SocketTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the CloudPub WebSocket endpoint, completes the agent hello/ack handshake (following redirects), and stores the session token on success.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.SocketTransport.StartReceivingAsync(CloudPub.Components.IMessageExchanger,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the background receive loop and optionally sends EndpointStartAll when is enabled.
member.param: Handler for each decoded inbound message.
A token to cancel the receive loop.

member.name: M:CloudPub.SocketTransport.SendAsync(CloudPub.Protocol.Message,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a single binary-encoded protobuf message over the open WebSocket.
member.param: The message to serialize and send.

member.name: M:CloudPub.SocketTransport.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Sends a graceful stop message when possible, closes the WebSocket, and releases transport resources.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the CloudPub server returns an error, the handshake fails, or an unexpected protocol condition occurs.
member.param: The error message.
The inner exception, if any.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Exception thrown when the CloudPub server returns an error, the handshake fails, or an unexpected protocol condition occurs.
member.param: The error message.
The inner exception, if any.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions
member.summary: High-level operations for : publish, stop, unpublish, list, and clear endpoints.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions.PublishAsync(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts exposing a local service through CloudPub using the specified publish options.
member.param: The connected client.
Local binding, protocol, and metadata for the new endpoint.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The registered endpoint description returned by the server.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions.StopAsync(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,CloudPub.Protocol.Endpoint,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops traffic for an endpoint without removing its registration.
member.param: The connected client.
The endpoint to stop.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions.UnpublishAsync(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,CloudPub.Protocol.Endpoint,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes an endpoint registration and marks the in-memory status as offline.
member.param: The connected client.
The endpoint to remove.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions.CleanAsync(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clears all endpoint registrations on the server.
member.param: The connected client.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientExtensions.ListAsync(CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current list of registered endpoints from the server.
member.param: The connected client.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CloudPub.TypesExtensions
member.summary: Helpers for protocol wire names, default ports, URI construction, and host/port formatting.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.ToWireName(CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Returns the wire-format protocol name used in URLs and API payloads.
member.param: The protocol enum value.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.DefaultPort(CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Returns a common default port for well-known protocols, or null when none is defined.
member.param: The protocol enum value.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.ToEndpointUri(CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint)
member.summary: Builds a for the public remote address of a .
member.param: Server endpoint metadata from a protocol message.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.ToEndpoint(CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint)
member.summary: Maps a to the library's view model.
member.param: Server endpoint metadata from a protocol message.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.ToLocalEndpointUrl(CloudPub.Protocol.ClientEndpoint)
member.summary: Formats a int url string like http://localhost:8080/path, omitting port when zero and path when empty.

member.name: M:CloudPub.TypesExtensions.ToHostAndPort(System.Uri)
member.summary: Formats a URI as host:port, normalizing default HTTP/HTTPS ports when the port is omitted.
member.param: The base URI (typically the CloudPub server URL).

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientOptionsExtensions.CreateCleintEndpoint(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions)
member.summary: Converts publish options into a suitable for EndpointStart messages, supporting both URL-style and shorthand address formats.
member.param: User-specified protocol, address, auth, and optional rules.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from protocol.proto

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.ClientEndpoint.HasNodelay
member.summary: Gets whether the "nodelay" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.ClientEndpoint.ClearNodelay
member.summary: Clears the value of the "nodelay" field

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.ClientEndpoint.HasDescription
member.summary: Gets whether the "description" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.ClientEndpoint.ClearDescription
member.summary: Clears the value of the "description" field

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint.HasStatus
member.summary: Gets whether the "status" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint.ClearStatus
member.summary: Clears the value of the "status" field

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint.HasDefaultStatus
member.summary: Gets whether the "default_status" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.ServerEndpoint.ClearDefaultStatus
member.summary: Clears the value of the "default_status" field

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.AgentId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the agent generated and stored in config. Only used for docker containers, for other system hwid used

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Hostname
member.summary: Hostname of the machine where agent is running

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Version
member.summary: Version of the agent, used for compatibility checks

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Gui
member.summary: Indicates that agent is running in GUI mode

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Hwid
member.summary: Unique hardware ID of machine, used for agent identification

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.ServerHostAndPort
member.summary: Host and port of the server to connect to

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Secondary
member.summary: Flag that channel used for API commands, not for data/publications

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.AgentInfo.Transient
member.summary: Indicates that all created publications on this channel are transient and deleted after disconnection

member.name: T:CloudPub.Protocol.SocketAddr.AddrOneofCase
member.summary: Enum of possible cases for the "addr" oneof.

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.FilterRule.HasActionValue
member.summary: Gets whether the "action_value" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.FilterRule.ClearActionValue
member.summary: Clears the value of the "action_value" field

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.EndpointStopAll.SetOffline
member.summary: If true, set offline default status

member.name: P:CloudPub.Protocol.Message.HasConnectState
member.summary: Gets whether the "connect_state" field is set

member.name: M:CloudPub.Protocol.Message.ClearConnectState
member.summary: Clears the value of the oneof if it's currently set to "connect_state"

member.name: T:CloudPub.Protocol.Message.MessageOneofCase
member.summary: Enum of possible cases for the "message" oneof.
